---
title: "GSEA: SELENOP+ vs SELENOP- CD68+ Macrophages (UC)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(DOSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(ReactomePA)
library(ggplot2)
```

Preranked GSEA across GO, KEGG, WikiPathways, and Reactome databases comparing
CD68+SELENOP+ vs CD68+SELENOP- macrophages from the UC atlas (Fig. 1F).
DEGs computed in 02_myeloid_subclustering.R.

```{r load-degs}
# Input: DEGs from FindMarkers(SELENOP_exp Pos vs Neg) in CD68+ myeloid cells
degs <- read.csv("/path/to/uc/scrna/output/myeloid/cd68_selenop_pos_neg_degs.csv")

degs <- degs %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > 0.5 | avg_log2FC < -0.5) %>%
  select(X, avg_log2FC) %>%
  rename(gene = X)
```

```{r entrez-mapping}
entrez_ids <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db,
                     keys    = degs$gene,
                     column  = "ENTREZID",
                     keytype = "SYMBOL",
                     multiVals = "first")

degs$entrez <- as.vector(entrez_ids)
degs <- degs %>% filter(!is.na(entrez)) %>% arrange(-avg_log2FC)
entrez_degs <- setNames(degs$avg_log2FC, degs$entrez)
```

```{r gsea-go}
ego <- gseGO(geneList     = entrez_degs,
             OrgDb        = org.Hs.eg.db,
             ont          = "ALL",
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
             verbose      = FALSE)
```

```{r gsea-kegg}
mkk <- gseKEGG(geneList     = entrez_degs,
               organism     = "hsa",
               pvalueCutoff = 0.5,
               verbose      = FALSE)
```

```{r gsea-wikipathways}
wp <- gseWP(entrez_degs, organism = "Homo sapiens", pvalueCutoff = 0.5, verbose = FALSE)
```

```{r gsea-reactome}
react <- gsePathway(entrez_degs, pvalueCutoff = 0.5, verbose = FALSE)
```

```{r combine-results}
# Combine all databases and label source
react_sub <- react@result %>% select(Description, setSize, enrichmentScore, NES,
                                     pvalue, p.adjust, qvalue, core_enrichment) %>%
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")
ego_sub   <- ego@result   %>% select(Description, setSize, enrichmentScore, NES,
                                     pvalue, p.adjust, qvalue, core_enrichment) %>%
  mutate(Database = "GO")
kk_sub    <- mkk@result   %>% select(Description, setSize, enrichmentScore, NES,
                                     pvalue, p.adjust, qvalue, core_enrichment) %>%
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
wp_sub    <- wp@result    %>% select(Description, setSize, enrichmentScore, NES,
                                     pvalue, p.adjust, qvalue, core_enrichment) %>%
  mutate(Database = "WikiPathways")

all_gsea <- bind_rows(react_sub, ego_sub, kk_sub, wp_sub) %>% arrange(enrichmentScore)
write.csv(all_gsea, "/path/to/uc/scrna/output/gsea/cd68_selenop_gsea_all.csv")
```

```{r supp4-leading-edge-genes}
# Supplementary Table 4: GSEA results with leading edge gene symbols
# core_enrichment from clusterProfiler contains Entrez IDs; convert to symbols here
entrez_to_symbol <- function(entrez_string) {
  if (is.na(entrez_string) || entrez_string == "") return("")
  ids  <- strsplit(entrez_string, "/")[[1]]
  syms <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db, keys = ids, column = "SYMBOL",
                 keytype = "ENTREZID", multiVals = "first")
  paste(na.omit(syms), collapse = "/")
}

all_gsea_supp <- all_gsea %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(leading_edge_genes = entrez_to_symbol(core_enrichment)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Database, Description, setSize, enrichmentScore, NES,
         pvalue, p.adjust, qvalue, leading_edge_genes) %>%
  arrange(NES)

write.csv(all_gsea_supp, "/path/to/uc/scrna/output/gsea/cd68_selenop_gsea_supp4.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r filter-paper-pathways}
# Pathways selected for Fig. 1F
filter_gsea <- c(
  "Oxidative phosphorylation", "Selenium metabolism and selenoproteins",
  "Embryonic stem cell pluripotency pathways", "Iron uptake and transport",
  "Cholesterol metabolism", "response to cytokine", "Selenocysteine synthesis",
  "Interferon Signaling", "interleukin-12 production",
  "Signal transduction through IL1R", "canonical NF-kappaB signal transduction",
  "Interleukin-10 signaling", "Toll Like Receptor 2 (TLR2) Cascade",
  "MAPK signaling", "TNF signaling pathway"
)

all_gsea_filter <- all_gsea %>%
  filter(Description %in% filter_gsea) %>%
  arrange(NES)

# Standardize display names
all_gsea_filter <- all_gsea_filter %>%
  mutate(Description = recode(Description,
    "response to cytokine"                   = "Response to cytokine",
    "interleukin-12 production"              = "Interleukin-12 production",
    "canonical NF-kappaB signal transduction" = "Canonical NF-kappaB signalling",
    "Toll Like Receptor 2 (TLR2) Cascade"   = "Toll Like Receptor 2 Cascade",
    "Embryonic stem cell pluripotency pathways" = "Stem cell pluripotency pathways"
  )) %>%
  mutate(Pathway = factor(Description, levels = Description[order(NES)]),
         Color_Group = case_when(
           NES > 0 & p.adjust < 0.05  ~ "Positive w/ FDR<=0.05",
           NES > 0 & p.adjust >= 0.05 ~ "Positive w/ FDR>0.05",
           NES < 0 & p.adjust < 0.05  ~ "Negative w/ FDR<=0.05",
           NES < 0 & p.adjust >= 0.05 ~ "Negative w/ FDR>0.05"
         ))
```

```{r plot-fig1f}
color_map <- c(
  "Positive w/ FDR<=0.05" = "darkred",
  "Positive w/ FDR>0.05"  = "lightcoral",
  "Negative w/ FDR<=0.05" = "darkblue",
  "Negative w/ FDR>0.05"  = "lightblue"
)
offset <- 0.02 * max(abs(all_gsea_filter$NES))

p <- ggplot(all_gsea_filter, aes(x = NES, y = Pathway, fill = Color_Group)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_map) +
  geom_text(data = filter(all_gsea_filter, NES > 0), aes(label = Pathway),
            x = -offset, hjust = 1, size = 3) +
  geom_text(data = filter(all_gsea_filter, NES < 0), aes(label = Pathway),
            x = offset, hjust = 0, size = 3) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), axis.line.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "top", panel.grid = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 1, 0.5, 1, "cm")) +
  labs(title = "GSEA: CD68+SELENOP+ vs CD68+SELENOP- Myeloid",
       x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)", fill = "")

ggsave("/path/to/uc/scrna/output/gsea/fig1f_gsea_selenop.png",
       plot = p, width = 7, height = 4.2, dpi = 300)
p
```
